default / CLAUDE.md

A generic starting CLAUDE.md for any project. Architecture principles, testing and shipping discipline, and the conventions Claude Code should follow from session one. Copy it, then adapt to your stack.

typeCLAUDE.md

Overview

[One paragraph describing what this project does and who uses it]

Tech Stack

  • Language: [e.g. TypeScript]
  • Framework: [e.g. Next.js 14]
  • Database: [e.g. PostgreSQL via Prisma]
  • Hosting: [e.g. Vercel]
  • Key libraries: [e.g. Zod, React Query, Tailwind]

Project Structure

src/
├── app/          # Next.js app router pages
├── components/   # Reusable UI components
├── lib/          # Utility functions and shared logic
├── types/        # TypeScript type definitions
└── server/       # Server-side logic and API routes

Key Conventions

[Any project-specific conventions that differ from global CLAUDE.md]

Common Tasks

Running locally

npm run dev

Running tests

npm test

Deploying

[deployment command or process]

Important Context

  • [Any architectural decisions the AI needs to know]
  • [External services this project depends on]
  • [Known issues or technical debt to be aware of]
  • [Things NOT to touch / areas to be careful with]

Active Skills

The following skills are installed for this project:

  • code-quality
  • git-conventions
  • testing-practices
View CLAUDE.md source →
